positive: A whimsical and elegant depiction of a forest scene at twilight. The central element is a large, stylized, bioluminescent fox sitting upright among giant, stylized ferns and massive mushroom caps. The fox's fur should have ethereal, glowing teal and sapphire highlights. The background deep forest is composed of deep indigo, royal blue, and emerald green gradients, creating a magical, mysterious atmosphere. Focus on dramatic silhouette against glowing accents. Composition should be perfectly symmetrical and centered. Highly detailed, vector-art style illustration, linework, flat colored areas, clean edges, suitable for screen printing on apparel, vibrant contrast, rule of thirds applied to the fox's gaze.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low resolution, grainy, writing, abstract, photorealistic, bokeh, messy, grain, signature
